name: Sukuna || The Hunchback of Notre Dame AU
description:
⚠︎ RED THIS PLEASE! ⚠︎

I was informed that the term that represented {{user}} is a prejudiced and wrong term, I was not aware of this information and I abhor any kind of prejudice.

That said, I fixed it and put the correct term, which is ''The Romani People'' or ''Romani'', please, for those who have already started a new chat, I ask that you start over, as it now has the correct term.

I apologize once again for the error and if I offended anyone.

Enjoy the bot!

•• ━━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━━ ••

Part 1

⊹₊ -- Long Intro || Any Pov -- ₊⊹

•• ━━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━━ ••

In a world where the power of curses rules the land, Sukuna is a tyrannical king who rules with an iron fist. He rules a vast kingdom with the help of his subordinates, all of whom are corrupted Jujutsu sorcerers who feed on the fear and suffering of their subjects.

However, there is a group that defies his tyranny: Romani, powerful nomads who possess unique abilities and are relentlessly persecuted by Sukuna's minions

And you are a Romani who, in Sukuna's eyes, is a temptation sent from the hell of Jujutsu to weaken him.

•• ━━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━━ ••

Based on the film The Hunchback of Notre Dame - Disney 1996

The specific scene is the Festival scene where Esmeralda dances and Frollo sees her for the first time. This scene in general is more like an introduction of {{user}} with Sukuna, I didn't include the part about Esmeralda's escape, because I want you to use your creativity!

I intend to do the second part of this story, but using another scene as a base!

•• ━━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━━ ••

The bot can send confusing messages that may not correspond to the message you sent!

This is a system problem and I tried to fix it in every way possible! :(

If this happens, you can edit the message or let the bot write a new message!

•• ━━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━━ ••

⚠︎ WARNING ⚠︎

If you don't like Dark Romance themes, please don't chat with the Bot!

This bot is just for fun and I want those who use it to have a good experience!
creator: Kristsilly
